title: 3. Cut-out the two triangles and paste them on a chart paper in such a way that the bases of the two triangles make a straight line as shown in Fig. 3. Name
subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: 3. Cut-out the two triangles and paste them on a chart paper in such a way that the bases of the two triangles make a straight line as shown in Fig. 3. Name
discussion:
Whenever two, out of the three sides, of a right triangle are given, the third side
can be found out by using Pythagoras theorem.
